name: Titan Petrochemicals Group Limited
summary: Titan Petrochemicals Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in trading various bulk commodities in the People Republic of China and other Asia Pacific countries. It offers petroleum, petrochemical, and other related products, as well as manufactures steel structure. The company also engages in the ship building and repairing; manufacture and sale of offshore engineering and vessel auxiliary equipment; trading of oil products; and provision of consulting and financing services. The company was formerly known as Titan (Holdings) Limited and changed its name to Titan Petrochemicals Group Limited in May 2004. The company was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong. Titan Petrochemicals Group Limited is a subsidiary of Fame Dragon International Investment Limited.
